aws.rationale: AWS is the next live hosted proof for the 0.1 release candidate once an AWS account and credentials are ready. Track under monorepo open-cowork (products/wiki).

gcp.rationale: Wiki 0.1 is local-first; GCP Terraform remains maintained and render-validated, but live GCP apply/auth-boundary evidence is not part of the 0.1 release claim unless this status is changed to required.
